description: Native app surfaces phase A6 (docs/design/native-app-surfaces.md): the mobile interaction vocabulary on iOS. swipe (directional and point-to-point forms) drives mobile: dragFromToForDuration; click.duration long-presses (mobile: touchAndHold); type presses the device Home button (mobile: pressButton) with no element criteria. Settings (com.apple.Preferences) is the target because it ships on every simulator runtime, and the steps stay robust across runtimes ('General' is present on every version; no dependency on Developer mode or version-specific rows). find auto-scroll on app surfaces is exercised end-to-end on the Android leg and by unit tests (test/find-autoscroll.test.js). SKIPs on non-macOS hosts via the platform gate; the first XCUITest session on a cold runner builds WebDriverAgent, so the startSurface timeout is generous.

tests.description: Find the 'General' row and long-press it (touchAndHold; Settings ignores it, so the list stays put), swipe with both object forms, screenshot the app, then press the device Home button criteria-less and close the app.
